features.name: recursive_function_with_named_begin_block_and_macro_definition
features.description: Code should include a recursive function with a named begin/end block that defines a macro using `define inside the block

features.name: recursive_function_called_from_constant_function_in_wire_dimension
features.description: Code should include a recursive function invoked through a wrapper function, used in a constant expression context such as a wire dimension
